description_long: This is a stylized, compact single-propeller airplane with a matte green fuselage and straight, mid-mounted wings. The fuselage features a black cross insignia on the side, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The nose houses a wooden propeller, and the landing gear consists of two red-rimmed wheels attached to black struts. The tail section includes a white vertical stabilizer and a simple horizontal stabilizer, both with angular, geometric shapes. The cockpit is open and centrally located, with a small red seat visible behind the propeller.
description: A compact, stylized green airplane with a wooden propeller, mid-mounted straight wings, and red-rimmed wheels. Features a black cross insignia and an open cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black cross insignia, open cockpit, and angular tail with white stabilizer.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wooden propeller, wide straight wings, and red-rimmed wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible cockpit, cross insignia, and tail details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail structure, landing gear, and the back of the cockpit.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with straight, rectangular wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and straight horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a small tail skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Open, single-seat cockpit located centrally on the fuselage behind the engine.
